description: Product description : CCINEE 20 pcs kids animal masks are come in a poly bag made with a soft EVA material. Giraffe, Monkey, Tiger, Bear, Cat, Dog, hoggerel, Rabbit,Pig, zebra, wolves, mouse fox ect. ! Great for kids party bag fillers or as prizes for party games . Kids foam masks with elasticated straps in 16 assorted designs. Package includes: 20pcs Children face masks Customer Service: If you have any problem of our kid animal mask you can click "seller contact" button in your Amazon account to email us. we would be delighted to help you and we will reply as soon as we can. Product Warranty: 48 days money-back & 24-month warranty. Any questions please don't hesitate to contact us. If you like foam animal masks click Add to Basket to get it.
